assertions.title: Unauthenticated user is redirected from /dashboard to sign-in

steps.action: Navigate to /dashboard in fresh unauthenticated browser session

steps.observed: Sign-in page rendered; protected dashboard page not displayed

evidence.network: agent-browser request log shows document request to /dashboard followed by document request to /sign-in?redirect_url=.../dashboard

assertions.title: Unauthenticated user is redirected from /generate to sign-in

steps.action: Navigate to /generate in same unauthenticated session

steps.observed: Sign-in page rendered; generate flow content not displayed

evidence.network: agent-browser request log shows document request to /generate followed by document request to /sign-in?redirect_url=.../generate

assertions.title: Unauthenticated user is redirected from /convert to sign-in

steps.observed: Sign-in page rendered; convert page content not displayed

evidence.network: agent-browser request log shows document request to /convert followed by document request to /sign-in?redirect_url=.../convert

assertions.title: Unauthenticated user is redirected from /recipes to sign-in

steps.observed: Sign-in page rendered; protected recipes list not displayed

evidence.network: agent-browser request log shows document request to /recipes followed by document request to /sign-in?redirect_url=.../recipes

assertions.title: Unauthenticated user is redirected from /pantry to sign-in

steps.observed: Sign-in page rendered; protected pantry content not displayed

evidence.network: agent-browser request log shows document request to /pantry followed by document request to /sign-in?redirect_url=.../pantry

frictions.description: agent-browser request logs for this run did not expose explicit HTTP response status codes (302/307), only request method/URL/type sequence.
frictions.resolution: Validated redirect behavior using final URL and request sequence from protected route to sign-in redirect URL.

summary: Tested 5 unauthenticated protected-route redirect assertions; all 5 passed.
